about.name: Manikandan M
about.title: Full Stack Developer
about.tagline: I build systems that scale — from student projects to government infrastructure.
about.description: While most developers write code, I ship products. As a CS undergrad in Tamil Nadu, I've freelanced an EdTech app used by real students. I specialize in the full MERN stack, cloud infrastructure, and turning complex backend challenges into clean, fast, and reliable user experiences.

projects.title: C³ – Quiz & Student Activity Platform
projects.tagline: A freelance EdTech product — from idea to production.
highlights: Built a cross-platform EdTech product featuring a mobile app for students and an admin portal for quiz management, real-time evaluation, and analytics.
Handled end-to-end development including backend API architecture and database design.
Empowered 6+ administrators to evaluate submissions efficiently and track activity for 100+ active students.
projects.description: A freelance EdTech platform delivering real-time quiz participation and activity tracking. Built the full product — mobile app, admin portal, backend, and cloud deployment — independently.

projects.title: Engineering College Insights Platform
projects.tagline: Making 500+ colleges' data explorable and actionable.
highlights: Designed a full-stack analytics platform with a React interface featuring advanced search, filtering, and course-wise/cutoff-wise analytics.
Developed scalable RESTful APIs and optimized MongoDB database queries for fast data retrieval.
Consolidated fragmented data across 500+ engineering colleges (courses, cutoffs, intake) into an explorable and actionable dashboard.
projects.description: A full-stack web application for exploring and analyzing data from 500+ engineering colleges, featuring advanced search, cutoff analytics, and a scalable REST API backend.

projects.title: TNEA Seat-Matrix Portal
projects.tagline: Government-grade infrastructure. Built as a student.
highlights: Architected and deployed a full-stack portal on AWS (EC2 + S3 + NGINX) to manage Tamil Nadu's engineering admission seat allocation.
Built a real-time admin dashboard, secure document handling system, and reusable React UI components for seamless institutional access.
Delivered highly reliable, scalable infrastructure to manage 200,000+ government seats across 500+ colleges with zero tolerance for downtime.
projects.description: A statewide seat-allocation system used by 500+ engineering colleges across Tamil Nadu to manage 200,000+ government seats - with admin dashboards, cloud storage, and NGINX-served production deployment.

experience.summary: Led end-to-end development of a government-grade seat-allocation platform used statewide.
highlights: Built and deployed a seat-matrix portal adopted by 500+ engineering colleges across Tamil Nadu for government seat allocation.
Streamlined data entry for 200,000+ seats — replacing entirely manual, error-prone processes with a centralized online system.
Architected a real-time admin dashboard for live college submission tracking and seat allocation reporting.
Integrated AWS S3 for secure document storage, improving data accessibility and retrieval efficiency.
Served as primary technical contact — debugging, user support, and system reliability across the full deployment lifecycle.
Developed responsive, reusable React UI components ensuring cross-device access for all 500+ institution users.

experience.summary: Contributed to the backend development and database architecture of a multi-institution Learning Management System serving 500+ students.
highlights: Contributed to the backend architecture of a multi-institution Learning Management System (LMS) designed to support 500+ students.
Designed and optimized relational database schemas for users, institutions, courses, enrollments, lesson progress tracking, and reporting.
Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to manage permissions for students, trainers, and administrators.
Developed scalable REST APIs for course management, enrollment workflows, and student learning progress monitoring.
Created normalized database structures and indexing strategies to improve query performance, data integrity, and institutional reporting.

education.note: Shipped production systems during active enrollment.
